listings.title: Pressure Washer (Like New)
listings.body: Generac 3100 PSI Pressure Washer – Like New (Used Only 3x) Description: Selling a powerful Generac gas pressure washer in excellent, like-new condition. It has literally only been used 3 times for light home cleaning and has been stored indoors. Specs: 3100 PSI / 2.4 GPM / 196cc engine. Price: $250 cash or Venmo Location: Pick up in Armonk.
